weekly picks (Feb 4 week 2026)

Posted on February 23, 2026 in 2026feb,  Daily t.me,  adsabs,  g scholar

A WordCloud of 2026 Feb 4th week collection

===This week’s pick===

  • Score :
Unfold/Fold

02/27

  1. s41467-026-69622-7 First-line modified FOLFOX plus/minus nivolumab and Ipilimumab or FLOT plus nivolumab in advanced gastroesophageal adenocarcinoma: a phase II multi-cohort trial (Nature Communications)

  2. s42005-026-02553-3 Distinct uniaxial stress and pressure fingerprint of superconductivity in the 3D kagome lattice compound CeRu2 (Communications Physics)

  3. s41598-026-41325-5 Quantum-augmented graph differential geometry enhances accuracy in protein-protein interaction prediction (Scientific Reports)

  4. s41598-026-41733-7 Machine learning-based Direct Normal Irradiance (DNI) forecasting using satellite data for Concentrated Solar Power (CSP) plants with Thermal Energy Storage (TES) (Scientific Reports)

  5. x164-8n1w Field Digitization Scaling in a ${\mathbb{Z}}_{N}⊂U(1)$ Symmetric Model (PRL)

  6. sl32-jn82 Correlated Noise Estimation with Quantum Sensor Networks (PRL)

  7. 3qyd-n621 $\mathrm{AdS}×\mathrm{S}$ Mellin Bootstrap, Hidden 10d Symmetry and Five-Point Kaluza-Klein Functions in $\mathcal{N}=4$ Supersymmetric Yang-Mills Theory (PRL)

  9. z5kk-98my Hyperon Spin Correlation in High-Energy Heavy-Ion Collisions (PRL)

  10. 6cjc-bhfg Discovery of an ${I}^{π}=1{0}^{+}$ Isomer in $^{150}\mathrm{Yb}$: Nature of the Longest ${10}^{+}$ Isomeric Chain (PRL)
